landing.hero_title: Cyber compliance & agentic AI — one consultant, real results
landing.hero_subtitle: DORA, NIS 2, ISO 27001, GDPR — I guide you from audit to compliance. And I automate your business processes with agentic AI.

landing.service_ia_desc: Automation of repetitive tasks with dedicated AI agents. The augmented employee that produces, verifies and learns.
landing.cta_subtitle: 30 minutes to understand your situation — free, no commitment

why.arg_1_text: 20 years at the intersection of IT, law and strategy. A rare triple competence.
why.arg_2_text: DORA, NIS 2, ISO 27001, GDPR — a coherent approach, one contact for all frameworks.
why.arg_3_text: Proven audit kits, tested methodology, ready-to-use deliverables from day one.
why.profile_years: 20 years at the crossroads of technology, law and business.
why.profile_experience: 20+ years of experience at the crossroads of technology, law and business.

simulator.hero_title: Which cyber regulations apply to you?
simulator.hero_text: Answer a few questions and immediately discover which frameworks are applicable or recommended for your organisation.
simulator.organization_subtitle: These 6 questions determine the applicable regulations
simulator.q1_label: Where is your registered office / main activity?*
simulator.q1_option_eu_clients: Outside EU but clients/users in the EU
simulator.q2_option_ict_b2b: ICT B2B services (MSP, MSSP, managed services)
simulator.q2_option_digital_providers: Digital providers (marketplaces, search engines, social networks)
simulator.q3_option_small: Small: fewer than 50 employees AND turnover <€10M AND balance sheet <€10M
simulator.q3_option_medium: Medium: 50-249 employees OR turnover €10-50M OR balance sheet €10-43M
simulator.q3_option_large: Large: 250+ employees OR turnover >€50M OR balance sheet >€43M
simulator.disclaimer: This simulator provides a general indication and does not constitute legal advice.
simulator.q2_label: What is your main business sector?*
simulator.q3_label: What is the size of your organisation?*
simulator.q3_hint: NIS 2: <50 employees AND <€10M = not in scope. Any single threshold exceeded suffices.
simulator.q4_label: Do you process personal data?*
simulator.q4_hint: Name, email, phone, IP, cookies, HR data, customer files... 95% of companies = Yes
simulator.q5_label: Do you hold a financial licence (AMF, ACPR, CSSF...)?*
simulator.q5_hint: DORA targets exclusively regulated financial entities. The 'banking/finance' sector alone is NOT sufficient without a licence!
simulator.q6_label: Do you provide IT/Cloud services to clients?*
simulator.q6_hint: MSP, managed services, SaaS, hosting, IT consulting...
simulator.conditional_subtitle: These questions refine your diagnosis based on your profile
simulator.q7_label: Are you an ICT service provider for regulated financial entities?
simulator.q7_hint: Critical IT subcontractor for banks, insurers, asset managers... → DORA applies
simulator.q8_label: Do you host health data for third parties (clients)?
simulator.q8_hint: For clients (hospitals, doctors, clinics). NOT your own internal data.
simulator.q9_label: Do you store/process bank card numbers (PAN)?
simulator.q9_hint: NOT applicable if you use Stripe/PayPal without ever seeing the numbers.
simulator.q10_label: Do you have activities or clients in the United States?*
simulator.q10a_label: Do your US clients require certifications (ISO 27001 / SOC 2)?
simulator.q10b_label: Do you work with the US Department of Defense (DoD)?
simulator.q11_label: Do you have critical activities requiring a business continuity plan?*
simulator.continuity_note: NIS 2 / DORA requires business continuity measures (Art. 21). A plan will be required even if you don't have one yet.
simulator.no_results_text: Based on your answers, we have not identified any mandatory regulation.
simulator.nis2_extraterritorial_note: Sectors subject to NIS 2 extra-territorial effect: (1) Digital infrastructure (IXP, DNS, TLD, datacentres), (2) ICT B2B services (MSP, MSSP, managed services), (3) Digital providers (marketplaces, search engines, social networks).
simulator.pdf_text: Get a PDF summary with all regulations, risks and deadlines.
simulator.pdf_popup_blocked: Popup blocked. Please allow popups for this site.
simulator.cta_text: Get a personalised audit and a compliance roadmap.

rgpd.sanctions: Up to €20M or 4% of global annual turnover

nis2.sanctions: Essential Entities: up to €10M or 2% turnover | Important Entities: up to €7M or 1.4% turnover

pcidss.fullName: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
pcidss.sanctions: $5K-$100K/month depending on duration + card processing withdrawal

iso27001.sanctions: Loss of contracts, exclusion from tenders

iso22301.sanctions: Risk of extended outage, financial losses

cmmc.sanctions: Exclusion from DoD contracts + False Claims Act fines

why.rgpd: Processing personal data with activity in the EU or EU clients/users
why.dora_regulated: EU financial entity holding a licence (AMF, ACPR, CSSF or equivalent)
why.dora_tic: Critical ICT service provider supplying EU regulated financial entities
why.nis2_eu_annex1_ee: Annex I sector (highly critical) + Sufficient size + EU registered → Essential Entity
why.nis2_eu_annex1_ei: Annex I sector (highly critical) + Sufficient size + EU registered → Important Entity
why.nis2_eu_annex2_ee: Annex II sector (critical) + Sufficient size + EU registered → Essential Entity
why.nis2_eu_annex2_ei: Annex II sector (critical) + Sufficient size + EU registered → Important Entity
why.nis2_extraterritorial: NIS 2 extra-territorial effect (Art. 26): entity outside EU providing services to EU clients
why.pcidss: Storage, processing or transmission of bank card numbers (PAN)
why.hds: Hosting health personal data on behalf of third parties
why.iso27001_mandatory: Certification contractually required by your clients
why.iso27001_recommended: International reference standard for information security
why.soc2_mandatory: Attestation required by your US clients
why.soc2_recommended: Standard expected by US clients for SaaS/Cloud providers
why.iso22301_dora_nis2: DORA + NIS 2 regulatory requirement (Art. 21) — business continuity plan mandatory
why.iso22301_dora: DORA regulatory requirement — business continuity plan mandatory
why.iso22301_nis2: NIS 2 regulatory requirement (Art. 21) — business continuity plan mandatory
why.iso22301_critical_sector: Critical sector — business continuity plan strongly recommended
why.iso22301_critical_activity: Critical activities identified — business continuity plan recommended
why.cmmc: Direct contracts or subcontracting with the US Department of Defense (DoD)

simulator.pdf_audit_section_title: Would you like to implement one or more audits?
simulator.pdf_audit_section_text: To implement the standards identified in this diagnosis, I offer personalised audits tailored to your context. Contact me at the address below to discuss your needs.

cookies.text: This site uses essential cookies for its operation.
